arts.ttl: Maja, Styles, Wallace - Tony Mowbray issues West Brom fitness update as 'reality' bites - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Albion boss Mowbray said: "A few didn’t train today (Thursday) because they got back last night (Wednesday) so it’s like second day of recovery. The likes of Torbjorn Heggem, Mikey Johnston, Grady Diangana and Isaac Price have been representing their countries ahead of a tough trip to Norwich this weekend.
